text: Destruction ray - attacks with a beam attack and also applies a wither effect to the enemy.
Destruction ball - explodes when hitting a block or an entity (hitting an entity causes a wither effect).
Lethal result - imposes an effect on the nearest entity that causes it to die after a while, unless it has an totem of undying.
$(o)Condition:$() Within 16 blocks of lava, fire, water, or in mountains/caves.
Cataclysm: 10% chance to instantly kill target with <25% health.
